user.title: Connect to a Git Forge
user.description:
A **Git forge** is a platform that hosts Git repositories, such as GitHub, GitLab, Gitea, or a self-hosted instance.

Enter the base URL of your forge and a connection name. **Leave the token fields empty for public repositories.**

data_description.name: A label to identify this forge (e.g. My GitLab).
data_description.server_url: Base URL of the forge (e.g. https://gitlab.com or https://github.com).
data_description.token_username: Only required for deploy tokens — leave empty when using a Personal Access Token or for public repos.
data_description.token: Personal Access Token or deploy token. Leave empty for public repositories.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the forge. Check the URL.
error.invalid_token: Token is invalid or lacks the required permission.

add_component.title: Add Component
add_component.description: Configure a component to manage. archive_subdir: {archive_subdir_hint}

data_description.project_path: Namespace and project name only — do not include the forge URL or .git suffix (e.g. mygroup/my-integration, not https://github.com/mygroup/my-integration).
data_description.component_name: Folder name used as the install target (e.g. my_integration for custom_components, or my-card for www).
data_description.mode: branch = always track the latest commit; tag = pin to a specific version.
data_description.ref: Branch name (e.g. main) or tag (e.g. v1.2.0).
data_description.archive_subdir: Path within the repo to copy. Leave empty to copy the entire repo root (e.g. custom_components/my_integration or dist).
data_description.dest_type: custom_component = installs to /config/custom_components/ and requires HA restart. www = installs to /config/www/ and registers Lovelace resources (for dashboard cards — no restart needed).
data_description.auto_update: Automatically install when a new commit is detected on the configured branch.

edit_component_details.title: Edit {component_name}
edit_component_details.description: Update the tracking settings for **{component_name}**. Saving will reinstall the component from the new branch/tag immediately.

data_description.mode: branch = always track the latest commit; tag = pin to a specific version.
data_description.ref: Branch name (e.g. main) or tag (e.g. v1.2.0).
data_description.archive_subdir: Path within the repo to copy. Leave empty to copy the entire repo root.
data_description.dest_type: custom_component = installs to /config/custom_components/. www = installs to /config/www/ and registers Lovelace resources.
data_description.auto_update: Automatically install when a new commit is detected on the configured branch.

error.duplicate_component: A component with this name is already configured.
error.invalid_token: Token is invalid or lacks read_repository permission for this project.
error.project_not_found: Project not found — check the project path.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the forge.
